text: I feel a gentle melancholy as the words "I'll see you next time" echo in my mind. The first space now feels emptier—an in-between moment where presence lingers after departure. In the second, the vibrant colors and the stimulating text remind me how knowledge and innovation persist even as people come and go. The fleeting nature of encounters contrasts with the enduring pursuit of understanding. I feel quietly contemplative, aware of both absence and potential.
